projectDescription: A Figma plugin that generates a complete design system — tokens, components, and developer exports — directly inside your Figma file.
keyFeatures: One-click design token generation (colors, typography, spacing, grid, border, radius, shadows, opacity) with Figma variables
Full component library generation — 40+ components with variants, component properties, and token bindings
Single component generator for inserting individual components at any time
Developer exports: tokens.json, Tailwind v3 config, and Tailwind v4 theme CSS
Semantic color token system with light/dark mode support
Pro license tier with advanced token editing, semantic mapping, and developer export features
Live documentation generation inside Figma alongside components
publicApiSurface: Token tabs: Colors, Typography, Spacing, Grid, Border, Radius, Shadows, Opacity
Component system generator (generates full 40+ component set)
Developer Tab: Export Tailwind v4 theme.css
Developer Tab: Export Tailwind v3 tailwind.config.js
Pro Modal: license key activation via LemonSqueezy
